title: Angrezi Medium
tmdbOverview: When his daughter decides to further her studies in London, a hardworking Haryanvi businessman does everything in power to make her dreams come true.
synopsis: Angrezi Medium (2020) is a drama and comedy film from India. It holds a solid 7.2 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a UA certification (IN rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
